ocr_issues: Primary source title and PDF file name contain 'Infation' typo.
Beta-bar definition in the Markdown has malformed OCR around the exponent.
Wage-markup notation around lambda_w contains OCR noise.
State-space equations after the ZLB section have malformed symbols; not needed for the derivation entry.
Steady-state formulas are referenced to a technical appendix that is not present as a local normalization file.
variant_issues: Same source Markdown maps to US_DNGS15, US_DNGS15_SW, US_DNGS15_SWSP, and US_DNGS15_SWpi.
Paper-side SWpi section defines a time-varying inflation target process, while the Rep-MMB cross-check file fixes pist and comments out that process.
Rep-MMB cross-check file retains inactive spread-shock equations despite stating the variant has no financial frictions.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only; user explicitly instructed not to run Dynare.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
